questionGroups.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write ONE WORD or A NUMBER for each answer.

questions.question: Members' details are on a ______
Type of music represented: modem music (______ and jazz)
Newsletter comes out once a ______
Cost of adult membership: £ ______
Current number of members: ______
Facilities include: rehearsal rooms and a ______
There is no charge for ______ advice
To become a member, send a recent ______
Address: 707, ______ Street, Marbury
Contact email: music. ______ @bsu.co.uk

questionGroups.instruction: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.question: What do participants need to take to the registration desk?
options: A a form of identification
B a competitor number
C cash for the entrance fee

questions.question: What does the entrance fee to the competition include?
options: A equipment for fishing
B all food for both days
C fuel for the fishing

questions.question: Participants without a fishing licence are recommended to apply for one
options: A at the registration desk.
B over the phone.
C on the internet.

questions.question: What will happen at 6pm on Sunday?
options: A The time allocated for fishing will end.
B The fish caught will be judged.
C The prizes will be awarded to the winners.

questionGroups.instruction: Label the map below. Write the correct letter, A-H, next to questions 15-20.

questions.question: Registration area
Shore fishing area
Boat launching area
Judging area
Dining area
Prize-giving area

questionGroups.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.question: Max and Abby agree that in the art exhibition they are looking forward to
options: A showing people their work.
B getting feedback from their tutor.
C talking to other students about their displays.

questions.question: In last year’s exhibition, both students were impressed by
options: A a set of metal sculptures.
B a series of wooden models.
C a collection of textile designs.

questions.question: What has Max decided to call his display?
options: A Mother Nature
B Views of Farmland
C Seasons

questions.question: What does Abby think will be difficult about preparing for their displays?
options: A having enough time to set it up
B choosing which pieces to show
C filling up all the available space

questions.question: What does Abby say about the summary they have to write?
options: A She isn't sure whether people will read it.
B It will be difficult to keep it short enough.
C It will be hard to clarify the reasons for her work.

questions.question: What aspect of the display will the students organise themselves?
options: A arranging the lighting
B inviting local journalists
C providing comment forms

questionGroups.instruction: Which feature do the speakers identify as particularly interesting for each of the following exhibitions they saw? Choose FOUR answers from the box and write the correct letter, A-F.
options: A the realistic colours
B the sense of space
C the unusual interpretation of the theme
D the painting technique
E the variety of materials use
F the use of light and shade

questions.question: On the Water
City Life
Faces
Moods

questionGroups.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.

questions.question: Mangrove forests: protect coastal areas from ______ by the sea
Mangroves had been used by farmers as ______
Mangroves were poisoned by the use of ______
Local people used the mangroves as a place to put their ______
A barrier which was made of ______ was constructed - but it failed
The seeds of the ______ mangrove were used
First set of seedlings: kept in small pots in a ______
Watered with ______ rain water
At risk from the large ______ population
The young plants were destroyed in a ______
